source: Hand-listed 11-bar volume series with a 5-bar all-zero run (indices 5-9) to pin the zero-SMA -> None rule (index 9's trailing 5-window is entirely zero). Expected values computed by an independent, from-spec reference implementation (scratchpad/gen_golden_p1b45.py, ref_volume_ratio): vol[i]/SMA(period)(vol)[i], None when the SMA itself is 0.0, per SPRINT-P1B-indicators.md addendum, NOT by running tradekit's stub.
